context.role: Ground surface that defines running level and provides visual reference
context.screen_position: y=0px (ground level), x scrolls from 0 to -1200px then loops
context.usage_scenario: Continuously scrolling ground that creates sense of movement, landing surface for player

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal line with optional small rocks/grass texture below
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, minimal texture (optional small rocks/grass every 50-100px)

animation.description: Scrolls left at Current_Speed, loops when x < -1200px by adding 1200px to x position

visual_specification.details: 2px horizontal line at y=0, optional texture layer 10px tall below line, seamless tiling pattern

relationships.shared_with: All ground-based objects use this as y=0 reference
relationships.differences_from: background scrolls at 0.5x speed (parallax), ground scrolls at 1.0x speed

explicit_negations: No parallax scrolling for ground line itself
No decorative objects that affect gameplay
